component.name: Compress for Discord
component.summary: Compress videos and images to fit Discord's upload limit

description.p: Pick a video or image, get a copy that fits just under Discord's upload limit, already on your clipboard. Videos and animated GIFs become H.264 MP4 (GPU-accelerated when available, sized to the limit); images become PNG, downscaled just enough to fit. Supports the free 10 MB tier plus Nitro presets.
